00000.name: normal, successful completion
00000.action: No action needed. This is a successful completion message.

00001.name: unique constraint violated
00001.cause: An attempt was made to insert or update a duplicate value in a column that has a unique constraint.
00001.action: Check the constraint definition and ensure unique values are being inserted. Remove duplicates if necessary.

00016.name: Unable to set more than string sessions for developer's instance
00016.cause: The number of requested sessions exceeds the maximum allowed for developer instances.
00016.action: Reduce the number of sessions or upgrade to a standard instance.

00017.name: session requested to set trace event
00017.cause: Session trace event has been set.
00017.action: Check if tracing is needed. Disable trace if it's affecting performance.

00018.name: maximum number of sessions exceeded
00018.cause: The number of connected sessions exceeds the SESSIONS parameter.
00018.action: Increase the SESSIONS parameter or reduce the number of concurrent sessions.

00019.name: maximum number of session licenses exceeded
00019.cause: The number of active sessions exceeds the licensed limit.
00019.action: Purchase additional licenses or reduce concurrent sessions.

00020.name: exceeded maximum number of processes specified in initialization parameter
00020.cause: The number of processes exceeds the PROCESSES initialization parameter.
00020.action: Increase the PROCESSES parameter value and restart the database.

00021.name: Cannot switch session because that session is being used by other users
00021.cause: Multiple users are trying to use the same session.
00021.action: Create separate sessions for each user or wait for other users to release the session.

00022.name: invalid session ID; access denied
00022.cause: The specified session ID does not exist or access is denied.
00022.action: Verify the session ID and ensure you have proper privileges to access the session.

00023.name: session references process private memory; cannot detach session
00023.cause: The session has references to process-private memory and cannot be detached.
00023.action: Terminate the session and establish a new one.

00024.name: logins from more than one process not allowed in single-process mode
00024.cause: An attempt was made to log in from multiple processes in single-process mode.
00024.action: Run the database in multi-process mode if multiple process logins are needed.

00025.name: SGA memory allocation request of string failed
00025.cause: The System Global Area (SGA) cannot allocate the requested memory.
00025.action: Increase SGA size or reduce memory-consuming components.

00026.name: missing or invalid session ID
00026.cause: The session ID is missing or not valid.

00027.name: cannot kill current session
00027.cause: An attempt was made to kill the current session.
00027.action: Connect as a different session to kill the problematic session.

00028.name: session has been terminated
00028.cause: The session has been killed or terminated.
00028.action: Reconnect to the database to establish a new session.

00029.name: session is not a user session
00029.cause: The operation is being attempted on a non-user session.
00029.action: Perform the operation on a valid user session.

00030.name: User session ID does not exist
00030.cause: The specified user session ID does not exist.
00030.action: Verify the session ID and try again.

00031.name: session marked for kill
00031.cause: The session has been marked for termination.
00031.action: Wait for the session to complete current operations and terminate.

00032.name: invalid session migration password
00032.cause: The session migration password is invalid or incorrect.
00032.action: Provide the correct session migration password.

00033.name: current session has empty migration password
00033.cause: The current session has no migration password set.
00033.action: Set a migration password for the session if needed.

00034.name: cannot string in current PL/SQL session
00034.cause: The operation cannot be performed in the current PL/SQL session.
00034.action: Complete the current PL/SQL operation or exit the session.

00035.name: LICENSE_MAX_USERS cannot be less than current number of users
00035.cause: The new LICENSE_MAX_USERS value is less than the current number of users.
00035.action: Increase the LICENSE_MAX_USERS value or reduce the number of users.

00036.name: maximum number of recursive SQL levels exceeded
00036.cause: The recursive SQL depth exceeds the limit.
00036.action: Reduce the recursion depth or increase the initialization parameter.

00037.name: cannot switch to a session belonging to a different server group
00037.cause: An attempt was made to switch to a session in a different server group.
00037.action: Switch to a session in the current server group.

00038.name: Cannot create session: server group belongs to another user
00038.cause: The server group is owned by another user.
00038.action: Use a server group that is available to your user account.

00039.name: error during periodic action
00039.cause: An error occurred while executing a periodic action.
00039.action: Check the alert log for details and correct the underlying issue.

00040.name: active time limit exceeded - call aborted
00040.cause: The active time limit for the operation has been exceeded.
00040.action: Optimize the operation or increase the time limit if allowed.

00041.name: active time limit exceeded - session terminated
00041.cause: The session exceeded its active time limit and was terminated.
00041.action: Reconnect and optimize operations to complete within the time limit.

00042.name: Unknown Service name string
00042.cause: The specified service name is not registered in the listener.
00042.action: Check the service name and ensure it is properly registered with the listener.

00043.name: remote operation failed
00043.cause: A remote operation encountered an error.
00043.action: Check the remote database status and network connectivity.

00044.name: timed_statistics parameter must be TRUE when statistics_level parameter is not BASIC
00044.cause: The timed_statistics parameter is not set to TRUE when statistics_level is not BASIC.
00044.action: Set timed_statistics=TRUE in the initialization parameters.

00045.name: Your session has been terminated with no replay
00045.cause: The session was terminated and cannot be replayed.
00045.action: Reconnect to the database and resubmit your work.

00046.name: cannot modify sessions parameter
00046.cause: The SESSIONS parameter cannot be modified in the current configuration.
00046.action: Restart the database after changing the SESSIONS parameter.

00047.name: cannot set sessions parameter to this value
00047.cause: The specified value for SESSIONS parameter is invalid.
00047.action: Use a valid value for the SESSIONS parameter.

00049.name: maximum number of DB_FILES exceeded for the PDB
00049.cause: The number of data files exceeds the DB_FILES parameter.
00049.action: Increase the DB_FILES parameter and restart the database.

00050.name: Operating system error occurred while obtaining an enqueue
00050.cause: The operating system returned an error while acquiring an enqueue.
00050.action: Check operating system error messages and system resources.

00051.name: timeout occurred while waiting for a resource
00051.cause: A resource acquisition request timed out.
00051.action: Reduce load on the system or increase the timeout value.

00052.name: maximum number of enqueue resources exceeded
00052.cause: The number of enqueue resources exceeds the configured limit.
00052.action: Increase the enqueue resources parameter or reduce lock contention.

00053.name: maximum number of enqueues exceeded
00053.cause: The total number of enqueues has exceeded the limit.
00053.action: Increase the enqueue limit or optimize lock usage in applications.

00054.name: resource busy and acquire with NOWAIT specified or timeout occurred
00054.cause: A resource is locked by another session.
00054.action: Wait for the other session to release the lock or kill the blocking session.

00055.name: maximum number of DML locks exceeded
00055.cause: The number of DML locks exceeds the DML_LOCKS parameter.
00055.action: Increase the DML_LOCKS parameter and restart the database.

00056.name: DDL lock on object is already held in an incompatible mode
00056.cause: Another session holds a DDL lock on the object in an incompatible mode.
00056.action: Wait for the other session to release the lock or kill the blocking session.

00057.name: maximum number of temporary table locks exceeded
00057.cause: The number of temporary table locks exceeds the limit.
00057.action: Reduce the number of temporary tables or optimize usage.

00058.name: DB_BLOCK_SIZE must be string to mount this database
00058.cause: The DB_BLOCK_SIZE parameter does not match the database block size.
00058.action: Set DB_BLOCK_SIZE to the correct value and restart the database.

00059.name: maximum number of DB_FILES exceeded
00059.cause: The number of data files exceeds the DB_FILES parameter.
00059.action: Increase the DB_FILES parameter and restart the database.

00060.name: deadlock detected while waiting for resource
00060.cause: A circular lock dependency was detected between sessions.
00060.action: Identify and eliminate the circular lock dependency. Optimize transaction design.

00061.name: another instance has a different DML_LOCKS setting
00061.cause: DML_LOCKS parameter differs between database instances.
00061.action: Set the same DML_LOCKS value on all instances.

00062.name: DML full-table lock cannot be acquired; DML_LOCKS is 0
00062.cause: DML_LOCKS is set to 0, preventing full-table locks.
00062.action: Increase the DML_LOCKS parameter if full-table locks are needed.

00063.name: maximum number of log files exceeded string
00063.cause: The number of log files exceeds the configured maximum.
00063.action: Archive log files or increase the maximum log file limit.

00064.name: object is too large to allocate on this O/S
00064.cause: The object size exceeds the operating system's allocation limit.
00064.action: Reduce object size or upgrade the operating system.

01000.name: Maximum open cursors exceeded
01000.cause: The number of open cursors exceeds the OPEN_CURSORS parameter.
01000.action: Close unused cursors or increase the OPEN_CURSORS parameter.

01012.name: Not logged on
01012.cause: No database connection has been established.
01012.action: Establish a connection to the database.

01017.name: invalid username/password; logon denied
01017.cause: The username or password provided is incorrect.
01017.action: Verify the username and password and try again.

01031.name: insufficient privileges
01031.cause: The user lacks the necessary privileges to perform the operation.
01031.action: Grant the required privileges to the user or contact the DBA.

01033.name: ORACLE initialization or shutdown in progress
01033.cause: The database is initializing or shutting down.
01033.action: Wait for the database to complete initialization or shutdown.

01034.name: ORACLE not available
01034.cause: The database instance is not available or not started.
01034.action: Start the database instance and verify it is running.

01041.name: internal error - hostdef extension missing
01041.cause: Required host definition extension is missing.

01043.name: user side memory corruption
01043.cause: Memory corruption detected on the user side.
01043.action: Restart the application and check system memory.

01051.name: ORACLE procedure tables corrupted
01051.action: Restore from backup or contact Oracle Support.

01075.name: you are not connected to ORACLE
01075.cause: No active connection to the database exists.
01075.action: Establish a connection to the database.

01109.name: database not open
01109.cause: The database is not open or mounted properly.
01109.action: Open the database using ALTER DATABASE OPEN.

01110.name: data file not open
01110.cause: A data file is offline or cannot be opened.
01110.action: Bring the data file online or recover it.

01403.name: no data found
01403.cause: A SELECT INTO statement returned no rows.
01403.action: Check the query conditions or use exception handling.

01401.name: inserted value too large for column
01401.cause: The value being inserted exceeds the column size.
01401.action: Increase the column size or reduce the value length.

01405.name: The fetched column returned a NULL value
01405.cause: A fetched column value is NULL.
01405.action: Handle NULL values using NVL or check the source data.

01406.name: fetched column value was truncated
01406.cause: A column value was truncated during fetch.
01406.action: Increase the buffer size or use a larger data type.

01407.name: cannot update (string) to NULL
01407.cause: An attempt was made to set a NOT NULL column to NULL.
01407.action: Provide a non-NULL value or remove the NOT NULL constraint.

01422.name: exact fetch returns more than requested rows
01422.cause: A SELECT INTO returned more than one row.
01422.action: Use a cursor or BULK COLLECT for multiple rows.

01438.name: value larger than specified precision
01438.cause: A numeric value exceeds the column precision.
01438.action: Increase the column precision or reduce the value.

01445.name: cannot select ROWID from view
01445.cause: ROWID cannot be selected from a view without a base table.
01445.action: Select from the base table or use a different identifier.

01489.name: result of string concatenation is too long
01489.cause: String concatenation result exceeds the maximum length.
01489.action: Use CLOB or split the concatenation.

01552.name: non-system tablespace contains data from multiple databases
01552.cause: A tablespace has data from multiple databases.
01552.action: Restore the datafile from the correct database backup.

01553.name: unable to create INITIAL extent for cluster
01553.cause: Cannot create initial extent for a cluster.
01553.action: Increase tablespace size or remove fragmentation.

01554.name: unable to create NEXT extent for cluster
01554.cause: Cannot create next extent for a cluster.
01554.action: Add more space to the tablespace.

01555.name: snapshot too old
01555.cause: Undo information for a read is no longer available in the undo tablespace.
01555.action: Increase undo retention period or use larger undo tablespace.

01562.name: UNDO tablespace cannot be read only
01562.cause: An attempt was made to make the UNDO tablespace read-only.
01562.action: Keep UNDO tablespace in read-write mode.

01578.name: ORACLE data block corrupted
01578.cause: Data block corruption detected in the database.
01578.action: Run DBVERIFY and restore from backup if necessary.

01650.name: unable to extend tablespace string
01650.cause: Insufficient space to extend the tablespace.
01650.action: Add a new datafile or extend existing datafiles.

01658.name: unable to create INITIAL extent for segment
01658.cause: Insufficient space for initial segment extent.
01658.action: Free up space or increase tablespace size.

01722.name: invalid number
01722.cause: A character string is not a valid number.
01722.action: Check the data format and use TO_NUMBER with error handling.

01745.name: invalid base type for REF type
01745.cause: Invalid base type specified for REF type.
01745.action: Use a valid object type for the REF.

01747.name: invalid user.table.column, table.column, or column specification
01747.action: Verify the table and column names exist.

01748.name: only simple column names allowed here
01748.cause: Complex expressions are not allowed in this context.

01752.name: cannot delete from view without key-preserved table
01752.cause: View deletion requires a key-preserved table.
01752.action: Use an INSTEAD OF trigger or delete from base table.

01760.name: illegal argument for function
01760.cause: Invalid argument passed to a function.
01760.action: Check the function documentation and provide valid arguments.

01776.name: cannot modify more than one base table through a view
01776.cause: View modification affects multiple base tables.
01776.action: Use INSTEAD OF trigger or modify base tables directly.

01789.name: query block has incorrect number of result columns
01789.cause: UNION queries have different column counts.
01789.action: Ensure all SELECT statements have the same number of columns.

01830.name: date format picture ends before converting entire input string
01830.cause: Date format does not match input string length.
01830.action: Check and correct the date format string.

01839.name: date not valid for month specified
01839.cause: Invalid date for the specified month.
01839.action: Verify the date is valid for the month.

02000.name: no rows selected
02000.cause: A SELECT statement returned no rows.
02000.action: Check the query conditions or verify data exists.

02014.name: cannot select FOR UPDATE from view
02014.cause: FOR UPDATE cannot be used with multi-table views.
02014.action: Remove FOR UPDATE or query the base table.

02290.name: check constraint violated
02290.action: Modify the data to satisfy the constraint.

02291.name: integrity constraint violated - parent key not found
02291.cause: FOREIGN KEY constraint violation - parent record missing.
02291.action: Insert the parent record first before child records.

02292.name: integrity constraint violated - child record found
02292.cause: FOREIGN KEY constraint violation - child records exist.
02292.action: Delete child records first before deleting parent.

02449.name: unique/primary keys in table referenced by foreign keys
02449.cause: Cannot drop table with foreign key references.
02449.action: Drop dependent tables first or disable constraints.

04000.name: invalid ALTER TABLE option
04000.cause: Invalid option used in ALTER TABLE statement.
04000.action: Check ALTER TABLE syntax and correct the option.

04031.name: cannot allocate SGA memory
04031.action: Increase SGA_TARGET or reduce memory-consuming components.

04043.name: object does not exist
04043.action: Verify the object name and schema, create if missing.

04061.name: existing state of package has been discarded
04061.cause: Package was invalidated and needs recompilation.

06502.name: PL/SQL: numeric or value error
06502.cause: Conversion, truncation, or arithmetic error in PL/SQL.
06502.action: Check variable types and values, use proper conversions.

06512.name: PL/SQL: cursor already open
06512.cause: An attempt was made to open an already-open cursor.

06550.name: PL/SQL: syntax error
06550.cause: Syntax error found in PL/SQL code.
06550.action: Check PL/SQL syntax and correct the error.

12514.name: TNS:listener could not resolve SERVICE_NAME given in connect descriptor
12514.cause: Listener does not know the specified service name.
12514.action: Check listener configuration and register the service.

12224.name: TNS:no listener
12224.cause: The TNS listener is not running or cannot be found.

12225.name: TNS:destination host unreachable
12225.cause: The destination host cannot be reached.
12225.action: Check network connectivity and firewall settings.

12228.name: TNS:protocol adapter not loadable
12228.cause: TNS protocol adapter cannot be loaded.
12228.action: Reinstall Oracle client or check protocol configuration.

12545.name: Connect failed because target host or object does not exist

12704.name: character set mismatch
12704.cause: Client character set does not match database.
12704.action: Set NLS_LANG environment variable to match database.
